notes: Built to mirror the user's RKSI STAR JSON structure: fixes, geometry, segments, sequence, startFix/endFix.
Holding patterns are excluded.
Some altitude constraints are stored as raw chart strings where exact min/max parsing is ambiguous.
Not for operational navigation; intended for map rendering and route-context analysis. Verify against the current AIP before operational use.

RKSS-STAR-OLMEN2U.name: OLMEN2U
notes: Parsed from AIP Korea (2-23) RKSS STAR.pdf, RKSS AD CHART 2-23 / 2-23-1.
Holding patterns excluded. Coordinates from Aeronautical Data Tabulation coding tables.
